raw_description: Equip any non-melee weapon in Primary and Secondary slots.
Replace the melee in your Dedicated Melee Slot with a Launcher.
Get 3 extra attachment points for your Primary weapon.
notes: Primary weapon attachment limit becomes 8 instead of 5.
The extra perk does not count towards Combat Specialty.

raw_description: Replace your Scorestreaks with 3 Perks. You earn them at 200, 400 and 600 Score. Earn all remaining eligible perks at 1200 Score.
notes: Perks equipped by using Wildcards do not count towards Combat Specialty.
